---
title: "Multiple Sidenotes"
papersize: us-letter
reference-location: margin
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensurePdfRegexMatches:
        - ['FIRST-NOTE', 'SECOND-NOTE', 'THIRD-NOTE']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

First point^[FIRST-NOTE content.]. Second point^[SECOND-NOTE content.].

More text in between.

Third point^[THIRD-NOTE content.].

All three sidenotes should appear in the margin with proper numbering (1, 2, 3).
